title: Creator tools in one place
subtitle: Pick a workflow below — dub videos with AI or work with audio in one place.
heroVideoSubtitle: Upload, transcribe, translate, and dub your clips with AI voice.
heroAudioSubtitle: Clone voices, translate speech, and generate studio-quality dubbed audio.
createBlankProjectSubtitle: Choose a canvas size and open the editor without uploading a video.
createProjectFailed: Could not create project. Please try again.
loginSubtitle: Sign in to upload and translate your videos.
audioDropHint: Voice cloning and dubbing tools will land here
toolTextToSpeechBody: Convert text to speech in various languages with trending voices.
toolVoiceChangerBody: Change your voice while keeping the tone and emotion.
toolBatchEditBody: Edit multiple product photos quickly at once.
toolVideoStudioBody: Easily create scripts, voiceovers, and media with AI.
toolRemoveBgBody: Remove backgrounds in videos and photos.
toolResizeVideoBody: Change aspect ratios in one click.
toolSuperSlowMotionBody: Get a smooth slow motion video to highlight your moments.
whatsNewVideoBody: Upload once and Vokop transcribes, translates, and voices your clip. New: faster processing queue and sharper lip-sync timing in the studio editor.
whatsNewDesignBody: Canvas templates, text overlays, and brand kits are on the way. Switch to the Design tab on the home page to get early access when it launches.
toolsSectionSubtitle: Professional tools to edit, convert, and polish your media in seconds.
